description: External skill-server repositories that `solomon-harness skills` can pull agent skills from. Each source is a git repository. A skill is either a folder containing SKILL.md (skill name = folder name) or a Markdown file under a 'skills' directory (skill name = file stem). Edit this list to add your own sources.

sources.name: anthropic-skills
sources.note: Anthropic's public Agent Skills. Adjust the URL if the repository moves.

sources.name: humanizer
sources.note: MIT. Removes signs of AI-generated writing, based on Wikipedia's 'Signs of AI writing'. Installed verbatim at .claude/skills/humanizer/.

sources.name: stop-slop
sources.note: MIT. Removes predictable AI prose tells; complements humanizer. Installed verbatim at .claude/skills/stop-slop/.

sources.name: superpowers
sources.note: MIT. Software-engineering methodology skills (TDD, systematic debugging, code review discipline).

sources.name: wshobson-agents
sources.note: MIT. Broad plugin catalogue: llm-application-dev, c4-architecture, quantitative-trading, tdd-workflows.

sources.name: claude-trading-skills
sources.note: MIT. Deep quantitative-trading skill pack (Kelly criterion, cointegration, microstructure, mean reversion).
